Part.Source: Event Start loadwwpContext.Call(&WwpContext) do 'LoadCliente' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridREFIN.Rows = Page.Rows &GridREFINCurrentPage = 1 &GridREFINCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridREFINPageCount = -1 GridPEFIN.Rows = Page.Rows &GridPEFINCurrentPage = 1 &GridPEFINCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPEFINPageCount = -1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ GridPEFIN.Rows = 5 GridREFIN.Rows = 5 EndEvent Event Refresh &GridREFINPageCount = gridReFIN.PageCount &GridREFINCurrentPage = gridReFIN.CurrentPage &GridPEFINPageCount = gridPeFIN.PageCount &GridPEFINCurrentPage = gridPeFIN.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridREFINPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridPEFINPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'LoadClienteAux' EndEvent Event GridREFIN.Load &RefinPesDebQtd = PesDebQtd &RefinPesDebCod = PesDebCod &RefinPesDebDta = PesDebDta &RefinPesDebVlr = PesDebVlr /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditaRefin = !'' &DelRPefin = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPEFIN.Load &PefinPesDebQtd = PesDebQtd &PefinPesDebCod = PesDebCod &PefinPesDebDta = PesDebDta &PefinPesDebVlr = PesDebVlr /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditaPefin = !'' &DelePefin = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridREFINPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridREFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridREFINCurrentPage -= 1 GridREFIN.PreviousPage() Case GridREFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridREFINCurrentPage += 1 GridREFIN.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridREFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridREFINCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridREFIN.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPEFINPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPEFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridPEFINCurrentPage -= 1 GridPEFIN.PreviousPage() Case GridPEFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridPEFINCurrentPage += 1 GridPEFIN.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPEFINPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridPEFINCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridPEFIN.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoaddREFIN' wpDividasCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, 0, TipoDivida.REFIN) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoaddPEFIN' wpDividasCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, 0, TipoDivida.PEFIN) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter Do Case Case (&PesPefQtd.IsEmpty() and &PesPefVlr > 0) or (&PesPefQtd > 0 and &PesPefVlr.IsEmpty()) msg('Caso informar QUANTIDADE PEFIN deve informar VALOR PEFIN, e Vice Versa!') otherwise GravaPessoaFinanceiroNovo.Call(&EmpCod, &WwpContext.FilCod, &PesCod, &PesProAtv, &PesPrtQtd, &PesPrtVlr, &PesResChe, &PesResSpc, &PesDtaCon, &PesEnvSpc, &WwpContext.UserName) &PesDivTot = (&PesPefVlr + &PesRefVlr + &PesPrtVlr) msg('Dados atualizados com sucesso!') EndCAse EndEvent Event &EditaPefin.Click wpDividasCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &PefinPesDebCod, TipoDivida.PEFIN) Refresh EndEvent Event &EditaRefin.Click wpDividasCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &RefinPesDebCod, TipoDivida.REFIN) Refresh EndEvent Event &DelePefin.Click wpConfirmaEliminacaoDivida.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &PefinPesDebCod, TipoDivida.PEFIN) Refresh EndEvent Event &DelRPefin.Click wpConfirmaEliminacaoDivida.Popup(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &RefinPesDebCod, TipoDivida.REFIN) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'LoadClienteAux' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod //PEFIn &PesPefQtd = PesPefQtd &PesPefVlr = PesPefVlr //REFIN &PesRefQtd = PesRefQtd &PesRefVlr = PesRefVlr Exit EndFor &PesDivTot = (&PesPefVlr + &PesRefVlr + &PesPrtVlr) EndSub Sub 'LoadCliente' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod &PedCliCodRaz = PesCodRaz &PesEnvSpc = PesEnvSpc &PesResSpc = PesResSpc &PesResChe = PesResChe &PesDtaCon = PesDtaCon &PesTip = PesTip //PEFIn &PesPefQtd = PesPefQtd &PesPefVlr = PesPefVlr //REFIN &PesRefQtd = PesRefQtd &PesRefVlr = PesRefVlr // //DIVIDA // &PesDivTot = PesDivTot // &PesDivQtd = PesDivQtd // &PesDivVlr = PesDivVlr //PROTESTO &PesProAtv = PesProAtv &PesPrtQtd = PesPrtQtd &PesPrtVlr = PesPrtVlr Exit EndFor EndSub
